chunks.title: Priestly Inheritance and Portions
chunks.reason: Defines the legal status of Levitical priests regarding inheritance and specific offerings.

chunks.title: Warning Against Abominations
chunks.reason: Commands the people to avoid pagan practices and remain blameless before God.

chunks.title: The Prophet Like Moses
chunks.reason: Prophesies the coming of a prophet and establishes criteria for testing his authenticity.
